case_title: KWAN YIN TSE VS. EUGENIA SMITH

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-04-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EUGENIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $132.00 FILED BY TSE, KWAN YIN AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EUGENIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE, KWAN YIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, EUGENIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
